content.explanation: Används i akademiska texter, affärsbrev och officiella sammanhang.
examples: I wish to express my sincere gratitude. Furthermore, it should be noted that...

content.explanation: Används i vardagssamtal och personliga meddelanden.
examples: Thanks so much! By the way, did you know...
Contractions (I'm, you're), slang, conversational connectors (well, anyway, so...)

content.explanation: Används i akademisk text för att nyansera påståenden.
examples: It may be argued that..., This suggests that..., Evidence indicates that...
Furthermore, Moreover, In addition, Additionally, What is more
However, Nevertheless, On the other hand, Despite this, In contrast
Therefore, Consequently, As a result, Thus, Hence
For instance, For example, Such as, To illustrate
In conclusion, To summarise, Overall, In short, On balance
must have (säker), should have (förväntad), might/could have (möjlig), can't have (omöjlig)
I would rather stay home. You had better leave now.

content.explanation: Grundformen (utan -s) används efter suggest, recommend, insist, require + that-sats.
examples: I suggest that she attend the meeting. It is vital that every student pass.

content.explanation: If I were you... (alla personer, formellt)
examples: If she were to resign, it would be a great loss.
Were he to fail... / Should you need help... / Had I known...

content.explanation: Point → Evidence → Explanation → Link. Struktur för analyssatser.
Lär dig känna igen hur diskursmarkörer signalerar textens struktur.

examples: This paper examines / argues / demonstrates / explores / investigates...
